title: 皐月賞の後に・4月の仇

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Did you see that, April?! I've avenged you!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
If they have the nerve to hold the Satsuki Sho in
your month ever again, I've got your back!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
These fists will rage just as fiercely for your sake
next year!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She charges off before I can inform her that only
classic year runners can participate in the Satsuki
Sho...
